pirType.description: legacy enum (ignored when params.algorithm is set); kept for proto_compat

assume_non_colluding.description: SimplePIR is single-server — non-collusion does not apply; leave 0

hint_path.description: persistent hint cache file (PSHC envelope; auto-save+load)

queryIndices.description: decimal row indices to retrieve from the dataset

outputFullFilename.description: path for client save query result
